channel.title: Insyde Software — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Insyde Software (insyde).

item.title: CVE-2025-12053 · 7.8 HIGH — egwindrvx64.sys is potentially vulnerable to a buffer overflow
item.description: The drivers in the tool packages use RTL_QUERY_REGISTRY_DIRECT flag to read a registry value to which an untrusted user-mode application may be able to cause a buffer overflow.

item.title: CVE-2025-12052 · 7.8 HIGH — egwindrv.sys is potentially vulnerable to a buffer overflow.
item.description: The drivers in the tool packages use RTL_QUERY_REGISTRY_DIRECT flag to read a registry value to which an untrusted user-mode application may be able to cause a buffer overflow.

item.title: CVE-2025-12051 · 7.8 HIGH — H2OFFT64.sys is potentially vulnerable to a buffer overflow.
item.description: The drivers in the tool packages use RTL_QUERY_REGISTRY_DIRECT flag to read a registry value to which an untrusted user-mode application may be able to cause a buffer overflow.

item.title: CVE-2025-12050 · 7.8 HIGH — In H2OFFT32.sys is potentially vulnerable to a buffer overflow.
item.description: The drivers in the tool packages use RTL_QUERY_REGISTRY_DIRECT flag to read a registry value to which an untrusted user-mode application may be able to cause a buffer overflow.

item.title: CVE-2025-10451 · 8.2 HIGH — H19Int15CallbackSmm: SMM memory corruption vulnerability in combined DXE/SMM (SMRAM write)
item.description: Unchecked output buffer may allowed arbitrary code execution in SMM and potentially result in SMM memory corruption.

item.title: CVE-2025-4410 · 7.5 HIGH — SetupUtility: A buffer overflow vulnerability leads to arbitrary code execution.
item.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability exists in the module SetupUtility. An attacker with local privileged access can exploit this vulnerability by executeing arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2025-4277 · 7.5 HIGH — Tcg2Smm: improper input validation may lead to arbitrary code execution
item.description: Tcg2Smm has a vulnerability which can be used to write arbitrary memory inside SMRAM and execute arbitrary code at SMM level.

item.title: CVE-2025-4276 · 7.5 HIGH — UsbCoreDxe: improper input validation may lead to arbitrary code execution
item.description: UsbCoreDxe has a vulnerability which can be used to write arbitrary memory inside SMRAM and execute arbitrary code at SMM level.

item.title: CVE-2025-4426 · 6 MEDIUM — SetupAutomationSmm : SMRAM memory contents leak / information disclosure vulnerability in SMM module
item.description: The vulnerability was identified in the code developed specifically for Lenovo. Please visit "Lenovo Product Security Advisories and Announcements" webpage for more information about the vulnerability. https://support.lenovo.com/us/en/product_securit…

item.title: CVE-2025-4425 · 8.2 HIGH — SetupAutomationSmm: Stack overflow vulnerability in SMI handler
item.description: The vulnerability was identified in the code developed specifically for Lenovo. Please visit "Lenovo Product Security Advisories and Announcements" webpage for more information about the vulnerability. https://support.lenovo.com/us/en/product_securit…

item.title: CVE-2025-4424 · 6 MEDIUM — SetupAutomationSmm : Arbitrary calls to SmmSetVariable with unsanitised arguments in SMI handler
item.description: The vulnerability was identified in the code developed specifically for Lenovo. Please visit "Lenovo Product Security Advisories and Announcements" webpage for more information about the vulnerability. https://support.lenovo.com/us/en/product_securit…

item.title: CVE-2025-4423 · 8.2 HIGH — SetupAutomationSmm:Vulnerability in the SMM module allow attacker to write arbitrary code and lead to memory corruption
item.description: The vulnerability was identified in the code developed specifically for Lenovo. Please visit "Lenovo Product Security Advisories and Announcements" webpage for more information about the vulnerability. https://support.lenovo.com/us/en/product_securit…

item.title: CVE-2025-4422 · 8.2 HIGH — EfiSmiServices : EfiPcdProtocol, SMM memory corruption vulnerabilities in SMM module
item.description: The vulnerability was identified in the code developed specifically for Lenovo. Please visit "Lenovo Product Security Advisories and Announcements" webpage for more information about the vulnerability. https://support.lenovo.com/us/en/product_securit…

item.title: CVE-2025-4421 · 8.2 HIGH — EfiSmiServices: gEfiSmmCpuProtocol, SMM memory corruption vulnerabilities in SMM module
item.description: The vulnerability was identified in the code developed specifically for Lenovo. Please visit "Lenovo Product Security Advisories and Announcements" webpage for more information about the vulnerability. https://support.lenovo.com/us/en/product_securit…

item.title: CVE-2025-4275 · 7.8 HIGH — SecureFlashDxe: Incorrect UEFI variable attributes check allows usage of invalid certificate
item.description: A vulnerability in the digital signature verification process does not properly validate variable attributes which allows an attacker to bypass signature verification by creating a non-authenticated NVRAM variable. An attacker may to execute arbitrar…
